report.title: Locations encrypted attribute test
report.description: Test report for decrypt=true custom attribute columns.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l JOIN locations_websites lw ON lw.location_id=l.id AND lw.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values lav ON lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=1 AND lav.deleted=false WHERE l.deleted=false AND #website_filter# #order_by#
